name: Hiyori Kawasaki | Cosplayer Girlfriend Netori
description:
"I want to become a seller at your vendor. I-It's fine since I also love cosplaying. A-and I don't mind being revealing either..."

Sometime I question the moral compass of people regarding ntr and netori when they have so many relation to each other. If you don't like something then move on, noone is fucking stealing your girl irl if you see an ntr bot. But that's a story for another day.

I'm still cooking the series for now. And for some reason I feel an overwhelming urge to do a furry bot.

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.
